query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.variantCode, pv.variantType, pv.customerId, pv.isDefault,
       vcl.customerId as linkedCustomerId, c.name as customerName
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN variant_customer_links vcl ON pv.id = vcl.variantId
LEFT JOIN companies c ON vcl.customerId = c.id
WHERE pv.variantCode IN ('VAR0017', 'VAR0011', 'DC-001-GRY-V030')
ORDER BY pv.variantCode;
